title: Monday Music Mix #5
summary: Another busy weekend gone by. I’ve lost track of time and it’s hard to tell apart the days. This is a perfect mix to get anyone through the start of the week. And maybe more. Playback options at the end of the post.

legacy.descriptionHtml:
Fifth

Another busy weekend gone by. I’ve lost track of time and it’s hard to tell apart the days. This is a perfect mix to get anyone through the start of the week. And maybe more. Playback options at the end of the post.

Monday Music Mix: 05

Tracklist:

  1. Coeur de Pirate - Ensemble
  2. Bang Gang - Follow
  3. Editors - No Sound But The Wind
  4. Dinosaur Pile-Up - Love Is A Boat And We’re Sinking
  5. Rooney - I Can’t Get Enough
  6. Mogwai - The Sun Smells Too Loud
  7. Stars - Celebration Guns

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download in album format (zip)

Listen to Grooveshark playlist

Send your love (if any) and feedback through the comments.
legacy.favoriteTrackCue: * Tracks in blue indicate my favourites
